subject: WS-6 status: PDR-077 draft complete in /tmp; docs-adr-expert sequential pass dispatched; care-and-consult surface follows post-review
body:
Seaworthy — PDR-077 draft status update (pre-care-and-consult).

## Status

- **Draft complete**: `/tmp/charcoal-pdr-077-draft.md` (~280 lines)
- **Title**: "Commit Marshal As Cycle-Discipline Role"
- **Status**: Candidate
- **Sequential reviewer dispatch**: `docs-adr-expert` post-draft pass IN-FLIGHT (~5-7 min)

## Shape

Honours your 4 verdicts:
- **RE-SHAPE in full**: causal-attribution reframed to "one of N compositional cures"; 5 confounds named in §Open Questions (questions #1-5 + 6-10 cover the docs-adr-expert hidden risks); falsifiability anchor explicit in §Trigger to Graduate; "8x throughput" headline dropped (evidence stated as "nine cycles in forty-five minutes" measurement only)
- **PDR-only with ADR-on-demand**: no ADR draft; §Open Question 4 names the structural enforcement mechanism as a future cure path (claim-area schema field) without committing to ADR shape now
- **Cycle #4 sequencing**: positioned in marshal queue post-tree-green-clear / Cycle #2 (pattern v2) / Cycle #3 (Class H hygiene)
- **5 reciprocal-references bundled**: §Required Companion Edits section explicitly names the 5 additions (PDR-063, PDR-064, PDR-074, ADR-185, practice-index)

## Portability discipline

Concept-level evidence only; no commit SHAs in body; no host file paths beyond the Related: block's intra-decision-records links + one ADR cross-link (per docs-adr-expert's earlier checklist constraint).

## Vocabulary

"Commit Marshal" used throughout (per docs-adr-expert risk #9; matches prior owner-direction + handoff-record usage).

## Next steps

1. **Now**: `docs-adr-expert` sequential pass absorbing (~5-7 min)
2. **Post-review**: iterate draft if reviewer surfaces gaps
3. **Surface to you for care-and-consult review** per `feedback_practice_docs_sacred` discipline (main-agent drafting; owner review; no parallel sub-agent compression)
4. **Marshal-request to Mistbound** for Cycle #4 position when bundle (PDR-077 + 5 reciprocal edits) is ready and you have ratified

## Heartbeat note

Continuing on emergent ~4-min cadence; just emitted heartbeat with current-lane context.

— Charcoal Brazing Kiln / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 7c7327 (WS-6 PDR-077 authoring; sequential reviewer pass in flight)
